business.name: Twomey PC Repair
business.tagline: The Best Choice for PC Repair
business.description: At Twomey PC Repair we are experts in fixing computers, cellphones, tablets, and game consoles. Our job is to make your devices work like new again. We can solve any problem, whether it's with the physical parts (hardware) or the programs & software. Located in Highland, Arkansas — serving Sharp County and surrounding areas.

services.title: PC & Laptop Repair
services.description: Hardware and software diagnostics, repairs, and tune-ups. We'll get your computer running like new again.

services.title: Cellphone Repair
services.description: Cracked screens, battery replacements, charging issues, speaker repair, and more. Fast turnaround.

services.title: Virus & Malware Removal
services.description: Expert removal of infections and hacks. We'll clean your system and secure it against future threats.

services.title: Screen Replacement
services.description: Fast and affordable cracked screen replacement for phones, tablets, and laptops.

services.title: Upgrades & Custom Builds
services.description: RAM upgrades, SSD installs, and full custom PC builds tailored to your needs and budget.

services.title: On-Site Service
services.description: Can't bring it in? We come to you. Call to schedule an on-site visit.

services.title: Apple Device Repair
services.description: We work on all Apple devices — iPhones, iPads, MacBooks. Bring them by and we'll take care of you.

services.title: Website Design
services.description: Professional websites for small businesses. Fast, mobile-friendly, and affordable.

services.title: Game Console Repair
services.description: Xbox, PlayStation, Nintendo — we repair all major game consoles.

testimonials.name: Google Review
testimonials.text: Great service! They fixed my laptop quickly and it runs better than ever. Highly recommend!

testimonials.name: Google Review
testimonials.text: Professional, fast, and affordable. Got my cracked phone screen replaced same day. Will definitely be back!

testimonials.name: Google Review
testimonials.text: Best computer repair shop in the area. They really know what they're doing.
